# Node n3 Evidence — docs-lookup → knowledge-lookup: Agent Rename + Un-vendoring

## task
Rename `agents/docs-lookup.md` to `agents/knowledge-lookup.md` and rewrite it per the n2 canonical spec; un-vendor it by moving `'docs-lookup'` from `vendoredAgents[]` to `localAgents[]` as `'knowledge-lookup'` in `scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js`; drop the vendored-table row and update count in `docs/agents-source.md`.

## non_tdd_reason
**Config / agent-definition authoring + file rename + validator-list move.** The changes are: (1) a file rename (`git mv`), (2) rewriting an agent prompt/config file (no behavioral logic — it is a declarative markdown document), (3) moving a string from one array to another in a validator config, and (4) dropping a table row from a documentation file. There is no natural failing unit test for any of these: the validator script itself (`validate-vendored-agents.js`) is the change-type-appropriate proof, and it passes green after the change. Category: **Glue / wiring** (wiring the renamed agent into the validator config) + **scaffolding** (the agent file rewrite is prompt scaffolding).

## write_set
- `agents/docs-lookup.md` → `agents/knowledge-lookup.md` (git mv + full rewrite)
- `scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js` (remove `'docs-lookup'` from vendoredAgents; add `'knowledge-lookup'` to localAgents between `'implementer'` and `'security-reviewer'`)
- `docs/agents-source.md` (drop docs-lookup row; update count 7 → 6)

## before_result
```
$ node scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js
Vendored agent validation passed for 13 agents at 922d2d8f8b64f4e50936e24465cb3bcac81ac0e1
EXIT: 0
```

## changes_made

### 1. git mv agents/docs-lookup.md agents/knowledge-lookup.md
Renamed tracked file; then rewrote content per n2 canonical spec (Section 2).

### 2. agents/knowledge-lookup.md — full rewrite
- Frontmatter: `name: knowledge-lookup`, description covering Context7 + open-web/expertise, `tools` array with `WebSearch` and `WebFetch` added, `model: sonnet`
- Provenance block replaced with exactly:
  ```
  <!--
  kaola-workflow-managed-agent: true
  locally-authored: true
  -->
  ```
- Role declaration updated to three-source knowledge-lookup specialist (n2 Section 2.4 verbatim)
- Security sentence replaced with n2 Section 2.5 VERBATIM injection-defense extension
- Context7 workflow steps 1-3 preserved (3-call limit intact); Step 3 fallback reference added
- Step 4 open-web research section added (n2 Section 2.7 verbatim)
- Output Format extended with web-fetched citation and Context7 citation bullets (n2 Section 2.8)
- Existing examples preserved

### 3. scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js
- Removed `'docs-lookup'` from `vendoredAgents[]`
- Added `'knowledge-lookup'` to `localAgents[]` between `'implementer'` and `'security-reviewer'` (alphabetical order)

### 4. docs/agents-source.md
- Dropped row: `| \`agents/docs-lookup.md\` | \`agents/docs-lookup.md\` | \`348d67c22219b3a51fde972ceffc1cc2f2e896e5\` |`
- Updated count: "Fetch the same 7 upstream files" → "Fetch the same 6 upstream files"

## verification_commands

### Completeness grep (no residual tokens in write-set)
```
$ grep -n "docs-lookup|DOCS_LOOKUP_MODEL" agents/knowledge-lookup.md scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js docs/agents-source.md
(no output)
EXIT: 1 (grep exit 1 = no matches found = PASS)
```

### Required token presence in agents/knowledge-lookup.md
```
$ grep -n "name: knowledge-lookup|kaola-workflow-managed-agent: true|locally-authored: true|WebSearch|WebFetch" agents/knowledge-lookup.md
2:name: knowledge-lookup
3:description: ...WebSearch/WebFetch...
4:tools: ["Read", "Grep", "mcp__context7__resolve-library-id", "mcp__context7__query-docs", "WebSearch", "WebFetch"]
8:kaola-workflow-managed-agent: true
9:locally-authored: true
21:...WebSearch...WebFetch...
23:...WebSearch, or WebFetch...
29:...WebSearch and WebFetch...
62:...WebSearch...WebFetch...
```
All required tokens present.

### validate-vendored-agents.js (change-type-appropriate check)
```
$ node scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js
Vendored agent validation passed for 13 agents at 922d2d8f8b64f4e50936e24465cb3bcac81ac0e1
EXIT: 0
```

## after_result
```
$ node scripts/validate-vendored-agents.js
Vendored agent validation passed for 13 agents at 922d2d8f8b64f4e50936e24465cb3bcac81ac0e1
EXIT: 0
```

build-green: validate-vendored-agents.js passes; 13 agents count preserved (rename, not addition).

## notes
- Agent count stays at 13 as required by n2 Section 0 — this is a rename, not an addition.
- The tools grant (`WebSearch`, `WebFetch`) is ROOT-EDITION-ONLY per n2 hard-constraint #2; `.toml` editions (n4/n5) do not carry a tools array.
- The upstream provenance block was stripped and replaced with the locally-authored marker, moving the agent from `vendoredAgents[]` to `localAgents[]` per the #227 un-vendoring precedent.
